highlights:

DATA & AI · Tekever Remote
...
# Data Scientist
...
Apply for this
...
We are seeking a skilled and motivated Data Scientist to join our team and contribute to the development, implementation, and optimization of advanced algorithms and models. Your work will support key teams such as Field Operations, R&D, Flights, Simulation, Autopilot by automating workflows and enhancing decision support, mission planning, and situational awareness capabilities.
...
Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, or a related field. A Ph.D. is a plus.
...
Experience: 3+ years of experience in data science and machine learning modeling, with a focus
...
Strong background in machine learning, data science, and analytics, with hands-on experience in building and deploying models.
...
Key Responsibilities:
...
Design, build, and refine machine learning models and data-driven solutions to address real-world operational challenges.
...
Work across the entire data science lifecycle: from problem scoping and prototyping to data annotation, model training, performance evaluation, and production deployment.
...
Process and analyze diverse datasets, including
...
to drone sensor data, geospatial (GIS) data, unstructured text, and other sensor modalities.
...
Algorithm Development: Design, develop and implement state-of-the-art algorithms and models, within the context of language models.
...
Capability Development: Realize new AI-based capabilities in areas such as decision support, mission planning, workflow automation, production data support and predictive modeling and maintenance.
...
Model Training and Optimization: Train and optimize models using vast amounts of textual data, ensuring high performance and accuracy.
...
Data Preprocessing: Perform data preprocessing tasks such as data cleaning, outlier detection, feature scaling, and feature encoding to prepare datasets for training and evaluation.
...
Research & Innovation: Stay up to date with the latest advancements in machine learning both classical techniques and deep learning and proactively apply cutting-edge methods to enhance existing models and develop innovative solutions.
...
Performance Evaluation: Evaluate the performance of models using appropriate metrics and techniques and iteratively improve their accuracy and efficiency.
...
Deployment: Collaborate with engineering teams to deploy models into production environments and ensure their robustness and scalability.
...
Technical Skills:
...
Proficient in Python, with hands-on experience using libraries such as NumPy, Pandas, SciPy, and scikit-learn for data analysis and modeling.
...
Machine Learning & Modeling:
...
Expertise in classical ML techniques (e.g., regression, classification, clustering) using scikit-learn, XGBoost, and other ensemble methods.
...
Solid understanding of deep learning architectures for time series analysis, including Transformers, RNNs/LSTMs, and CNNs.
...
Experience with model training, evaluation, and fine-tuning in varied computing environments.
...
Deep Learning Frameworks:
...
Proficient with frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, Keras, and TensorRT for building and optimizing deep learning models.
...
Experience working with Hugging Face Transformers for sequence modeling and transfer learning tasks.
...
Cloud & Deployment:
...
Experience deploying production-grade models, including containerization and REST API integration.
...
Familiar with cloud platforms (especially Google Cloud Platform), including ML services, storage, and serverless deployment.
...
AI Ethics and Bias Mitigation: Experience or awareness of AI ethics, fairness and bias mitigation strategies
...
Working with the very latest technologies in Data & AI, including Edge AI, Swarming - both within our software platforms and within our embedded on-board systems;
...
Department DATA & AI Locations Tekever Remote Employment type Full-time

results.title: Software Engineer & Data Scientist at Leidos | Jeremy
highlights:
Software Engineer & Data Scientist at Leidos | Jeremy
...
# Software Engineer & Data Scientist
...
Bay St. Louis, MSHybridEntry LevelMid-LevelBackendData ScienceClearance Required
...
Hybrid software engineer and data scientist role supporting the U.S. Naval Oceanography Program, developing mission-critical systems and analyzing complex geospatial and oceanographic datasets at the John C. Stennis Space Center.
...
Join the Exploration, Environment and Earth Intelligence Division at Leidos, where you’ll play a pivotal role supporting the U.S. Naval Oceanography Program at the John C. Stennis Space Center. This unique opportunity blends software engineering and data science, allowing you to develop and sustain mission-critical systems and extract actionable insights from complex scientific and geospatial data—directly impacting Navy and allied operations.
...
As a member of our embedded team at the Naval Oceanographic Office (NAVOCEANO), you’ll collaborate with technical experts, work with high-resolution databases, and help solve real-world challenges in undersea warfare, oceanography, and meteorology. You’ll have the chance to design, build, and analyze advanced software and data solutions in a dynamic, mission-driven environment.
...
### What You’ll Do
...
- Develop, maintain, and enhance operational software systems, from requirements gathering through deployment, using best practices in a hybrid agile environment.
...
- Design and implement methods to consolidate, analyze, and visualize large, complex, and diverse datasets from multiple sources.
...
- Apply advanced statistical concepts, algorithms, and automated processes to solve practical Naval Oceanography challenges.
...
- Collaborate with physical scientists, software engineers and data scientists on configuration management, data analysis, cyber reviews, and operational testing.
...
- Contribute to scientific data processing, geospatial mapping, and the development of tools, dashboards, and queries to monitor and improve operational performance.
...
### What You Bring
...
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering, or a related technical field; relevant experience or certifications may substitute for degree.
...
- Proficiency in programming languages such as C, C++, C#, Java, and Python (including libraries like Pandas, NumPy, SciPy).
...
- Experience with database technologies (e.g. SQL, NoSQL) and data manipulation in Windows and Linux environments.
...
- Familiarity with ESRI ArcGIS products and geospatial workflows.
...
- Ability to execute, troubleshoot, and modify scripts (Python, shell).
...
- Strong foundation in statistics, data analysis, and scientific data processing.
...
- Understanding of AI/ML techniques, cloud-based methods, and modern software development frameworks (e.g., MVVM, WPF, .NET MAUI).
...
### Preferred Skills
...
- Experience with NAVOCEANO production data, processes, and products (e.g., Oceanographic and Atmospheric Model Library, Navy Digital Bathymetric Database).
- Knowledge of classified and unclassified Navy computing environments.
...
If you’re passionate about building innovative software and uncovering insights from complex data—and want to make a real impact on national security and scientific discovery—we encourage you to apply!

# Senior Technologist Artificial Intelligence R&D
...
Location(s):UK, Europe & Africa : UK : Great BaddowBAE Systems Digital Intelligence is home to 4,500 digital, cyber and intelligence experts. We work collaboratively across 10 countries to collect, connect and understand complex data, so that governments, nation states, armed forces and commercial businesses can unlock digital advantage in the most demanding environments. Job Title: Senior Technologist Artificial Intelligence R&D (Lead Technologist) Location: Great Baddow (Hybrid 2/3 days onsite) Salary: Competitive Who we are Join BAE Systems and you’ll be part of something bigger. As a valued member of our global colleague network, you’ll bring your unique skills and perspectives to help pioneer progress and protect what matters most. You’ll be trusted to play your part in delivering the advanced, technology-led defence, aerospace and security solutions of tomorrow - shaping a safer future, for all of us. From the depths of the ocean, to the far reaches of space - there’s no limit to where a career at BAE Systems could take you. Role Description BAE Systems Digital Intelligence is seeking to recruit a Lead Technologist to join our rapidly expanding Data and Decision Support Capability. The Data and Decision Support Capability has teams working in: reinforcement learning; NLP/LLMs; knowledge graphs and graph based neural networks; AI for RF and EW, radar, sonar, acoustics, AI for image and video recognition tasks. The latter includes both computer vision and remote sensing application areas. Typical responsibilities include
...
- Lead technical delivery of large AI projects. Leading and assuring the preparation and delivery of technical reports, technical proposals and supporting material.
...
- Identify novel research in given topic areas, with the potential for partnership with leading UK Universities or other parts of BAE Systems. Direct research activities in key areas.

highlights:
Mid-to-Senior Data Scientist 2026-1579 – Cal Poly Pomona | Career Center
...
# Mid-to-Senior Data Scientist 2026-1579
...
SimVentions is 100% employee-owned and proudly ranked among Virginia’s Best Places to Work year after year! We are actively seeking a highly skilled and motivated Data Scientist to join the Autonomous Weapons Branch (H63) team, where he/she will be responsible for the development and integration of autonomy and artificial intelligence (AAI) enabled weapon systems.
...
- Experience with parametric modeling, computer vision, and game theory to support automated kill chain analysis.
- Knowledge of machine learning, neural networks, and artificial intelligence architectures.
- Proficiency in software development languages such as Python or C++ or analysis tools such as MATLAB for prototype automation and modeling.
- Proficiency in Linux/Ubuntu operating systems.
- Proven ability to identify, decompose, and resolve complex technical issues in a dynamic, high-tempo environment.
- Strong proficiency in programming languages such as Python, Java, or C++
- Solid understanding of machine learning algorithms, data structures, and statistical models
...
The primary focus of this role will involve developing complex parametric models to evaluate the performance of elements within a passive automated kill chain, encompassing sensor specifications, computer vision and perception autonomy, multi sensor fusion, and engagement autonomy. This modeling effort will be vital for informing the selection of subsystems and prioritizing automation development for passive kill chain capabilities. Beyond modeling, the individual will provide Subject Matter Expert (SME) support, conduct Science and Technology (S&T) investigations into computer vision or automation technology, and deliver comprehensive written reports. The Data Scientist will collaborate effectively with Systems Engineers to link system modeling to engineering requirements and partner with Software Developers to provide prototype automation software deliverables to meet mission objectives.
...
- Technical familiarity with weapons systems and fire control systems.
- Familiarity with software development tools, version control systems, and agile methodologies.
- Demonstrated capability to work successfully with diverse teams, including government employees, contractors, and academic partners, to ensure mission success.
- Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently and as part of a collaborative team.
- Exceptional communication skills, with the ability to convey technical concepts effectively to both peer-level researchers and leadership.
...
A Bachelor of Science (BS) degree from an accredited college or university in an engineering, scientific, or technical discipline is required
...
SimVentions takes pride in its innovative and cutting-edge technology, so you can be
...
that whatever project you work on, you will be having a direct impact on our customer’s success.
